name: selvedge
description: Change tracking for AI-era codebases. Captures why AI agents made each change — entity, diff, and reasoning — to a local SQLite database before the session ends. Answers questions like 'when was users.stripe_customer_id added and why?' and 'who added the payments table?'

tools.name: log_change
tools.description: Record a change to a codebase entity (DB column/table, function, file, API endpoint, dependency, env var, etc.). Set reasoning to the user's original request — captures the intent that would otherwise evaporate when the agent session ends. Supports changeset_id to group related changes under a named feature.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Get change history for an entity or entity prefix. 'users' returns history for the users table and all its columns; 'src/auth.py' returns all changes to that file.

tools.name: blame
tools.description: Get the most recent change to an entity — what changed, when, which agent made the change, and why. Like git blame, but for semantic entities and AI agents.

tools.name: history
tools.description: Filtered history across all entities. Supports since (24h, 7d, 30d, 5mo, 1y), entity_path prefix, project, and changeset_id filters.

tools.name: changeset
tools.description: Get all events belonging to a named changeset. Use to reconstruct the full scope of a feature or task across multiple entities — e.g. all DB columns, endpoints, and dependencies added for 'add-stripe-billing'.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text substring search across entity paths, diffs, reasoning, and agents. SQL LIKE wildcards in the query are escaped automatically.
